title: thymus zygis subsp. ilerdensis
intro: Thymus zygis subsp. ilerdensis, commonly known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thymus zygis subsp. ilerdensis include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. Thyme tea, essential oil, and dried leaves are commonly used in herbal preparations, and it can be consumed as a tea, added to soups, or used in aromatherapy.
